name: MISAKA Wallet (post-quantum)
description: Self-custody ML-DSA-87 (post-quantum) wallet for misakas (kaspa-pq) — testnet & mainnet.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; connect-src wss: ws: https: 'self'; img-src 'self' data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; object-src 'none'
